items.final_wording: Specifies visual assessment plus duration, evolution, distribution, symptoms, family history, recurrence, exposures, medication, impact, travel, allergy, and pet history.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Rashes in Children – 49
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for pediatric-rash telehealth documentation in Dubai; medication and dose passages were reviewed but deliberately not mapped.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Specifies visual assessment plus duration, evolution, distribution, symptoms, family history, recurrence, exposures, medication, impact, travel, allergy, and pet history.

items.rationale: Supports rash duration, evolution, distribution, symptoms, exposure and medicine history for diaper rash follow-up; no decision is generated.

items.final_wording: Lists emergency and face-to-face review criteria, including confusion, stiff neck, photophobia, persistent or recurrent rash, fever, immunocompromise, and diagnostic uncertainty.

items.rationale: Supports persistent, recurrent, febrile and uncertain-rash referral context for diaper rash follow-up; no decision is generated.
